tasks.label: Export OpenSCAD Prototype STL Set
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}'; $out = Join-Path $PWD 'rfq\abs_prototype\stl'; $src = Join-Path $PWD 'rfq\abs_prototype\exports'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $out | Out-Null; $exe = if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files (x86)\OpenSCAD\openscad.com') { 'C:\Program Files (x86)\OpenSCAD\openscad.com' } elseif ($env:OPENSCAD_EXE) { $env:OPENSCAD_EXE } else { 'C:\Program Files (x86)\OpenSCAD\openscad.exe' }; & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'cold_block_lid.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_lid.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'cold_block_base.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_base.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'coupon_main_16_0mm.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_coupon_main.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'coupon_mid_15_4mm.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_coupon_mid.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'coupon_small_14_8mm.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_coupon_small.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'prototype_support_frame.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_prototype_support.scad')
